trading_style.note: keep turnover low, favor swing and position trades

asset_classes.capital_source_note: Always use account 'cash' field for sizing and capital checks. Ignore broker 'buying_power' — it reflects margin capacity we never use.

sector_note: agents may screen and invest in other sectors when signals are strong — these are starting bias, not exclusions
notes: Free-form field. Update as your thesis evolves — agents read this on every run.
